title: Bees Witchcraft
description: Mods for playing minecraft on an older machine and improving quality of life without adding any content.
body:
# Description
Uses a variety of mods for the purposes of optimizing minecraft for old machines and improving quality of life without adding any non-vanilla content. Performance boosts will be increased as more 1.21 optimization mods are released and updated. 

## Benefits of this modpack will include,
- Better fps
- Faster load times
- Mod menu configuration of most included mods
- Better computer performance whilst the game is not in focus
- Easier use of inventory, F3, and crafting recipes (JEI), etc.
- Optifine-like zoom (bound to the C key)
- Optional shaders for those with mid-end rigs (shaders are disabled by default and not recommended to be enabled for performance but will be included for convenience for those who want them)

## Disclaimers
This is primarily for use on a private server but those who want the same benefits may use it as well! Use on public servers at your own risk. Inventory essentials, lithium, status effect bars, and others might not be permitted. To gain the full benefits from lithium in multiplayer it should be implemented server side as well. 

## Permissions
If you just want the performance updates without the quality of life improvements, Simply Optimized is a fantastic option and some of their config has been used here with permission under their "Derivative Packs" terms ([Simply Optimized's Page](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)).
